Meta.defaultTitle: NEVA BUILD — International Building & Interior Exhibition and Forum
Meta.defaultDescription: NEVA BUILD is the largest building & interior exhibition in North-West Russia. Manufacturers, suppliers, architects and designers. Expoforum, Saint Petersburg.

Hero.title: International Building & Interior Exhibition and Forum
Hero.subtitle: Building exhibition

About.label: About
About.title: The key event of the North-West building industry
About.text: NEVA BUILD is the largest building & interior exhibition and forum in North-West Russia. A meeting point for industry professionals: manufacturers, suppliers, designers, architects and developers.

Sections.label: Sectors
Sections.title: Exhibition sectors
Sections.description: 16 thematic sectors cover the full construction and finishing cycle — from foundation to interior.

ExhibitBlock.label: For exhibitors
ExhibitBlock.title: Present your brand to a professional audience
ExhibitBlock.text: Reach thousands of buyers, architects and contractors, close deals and strengthen your brand on the North-West market.

points.audience: Targeted B2B audience from the whole region

VisitBlock.label: For visitors
VisitBlock.title: Find materials, technology and partners
VisitBlock.text: Three days of industry novelties, a business program and live networking with suppliers and experts.

ProgramPreview.label: Business program
ProgramPreview.title: Three days of talks, panels and masterclasses

Partners.label: Partners
Partners.title: Exhibitors and partners
Partners.description: Leading building industry companies have already confirmed participation in NEVA BUILD.

Footer.about: The largest building & interior exhibition of the Northwestern Federal District. Since 2009.
Footer.newsletterText: Event announcements, early registration offers and market news — straight to your inbox.

AboutPage.title: About NEVA BUILD
AboutPage.lead: Where the North-West building industry meets innovation.
AboutPage.whyCityText: North-West Russia is one of the country's largest construction markets, and Saint Petersburg is its business and architectural centre.

ExhibitPage.title: Become a NEVA BUILD exhibitor
ExhibitPage.lead: Bring your brand to a professional building & interior audience.

VisitPage.title: Visit NEVA BUILD
VisitPage.lead: Three days to find everything for your projects.
VisitPage.whyText: NEVA BUILD brings together hundreds of suppliers, market novelties, a business program and networking in one place. In three days you will see what usually takes months to find.

faq.a1: The price depends on the ticket type. Visitor Pass is basic entry, Business Pass gives access to all days and the business program, VIP Pass includes all privileges. See the tickets page for current prices.
faq.a3: Free shuttles run to Expoforum from Moskovskaya metro station, plus public transport. Parking is available for cars.
faq.q4: Can I buy a ticket on site?
faq.a4: Yes, but buying online is faster and queue-free: a ticket with a QR code is emailed to you right after payment.

TicketsPage.lead: Choose a ticket type and buy your pass online.
TicketsPage.successText: Thank you! Your ticket has been emailed to you. Show the QR code at the entrance.
TicketsPage.failText: The payment was not completed. Please try again or contact us.
